title: Schema Source Partition
description: Configuration for partitions to use when querying this source

expr.description: The expression to use to determine the partition date, be careful not to cast here as that will prevent partition pruning

interval.description: The interval used for partitioning, this will be used to determine the partition date range

type.description: The type of partition to use (event_dates will build a list for comparison to the project event dates variable)

use_range.description: Whether or not to use a range for the partition date filter instead of a list

expr.description: The expression to use to determine the partition date, be careful not to cast here as that will prevent partition pruning

type.description: The type of partition to use (event_dates will build a list for comparison to the project event dates variable)

value.description: The value to compare the partition field to
